backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a university portal backend, defining data types and state for users, admissions, courses, fees, payments, hostels, results, and announcements, with role-based access control and Stripe integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated file paths, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for the portal access application page and admin access applications management section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted catalogue of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of admin, student, parent, and shared pages/components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the University of Africa Portal SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with all public, role-login, admin, student, staff, and parent routes, and wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProfi: Displays the authenticated admin's profile information (principal ID, name, email, ID number) in a card with a copy-to-clipboard feature for the principal. Shows a skeleton loader while data is fetching.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetup: Renders a form card for claiming the first administrator account by submitting name, staff ID, and email via the bootstrapAdmin mutation, then navigates to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects user profile details (name, role, ID number, email, department, level) and saves them via the saveProfile mutation; role can be pre-locked based on the login route.
frontend/src/components/auth/RoleGuard.t: A route protection component that blocks rendering of children if the user is unauthenticated, has no profile, or lacks the required role, showing appropriate UI states or redirects in each case.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site-wide footer with university branding, quick navigation links, portal links (routing authenticated users to their dashboard or to login pages), and contact/social information.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Top-level layout wrapper that renders children alongside a ProfileSetupModal, which is shown automatically when a user is authenticated but has not yet completed their profile setup.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Top navigation bar component that shows login/portal links for unauthenticated users and a dashboard link for authenticated users, using Internet Identity and user profile role to determine routing.
frontend/src/components/payments/StripeS: Form component that prompts admins to configure Stripe by entering a secret key and allowed countries; hides itself once Stripe is already configured.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: RoleGuard component that protects routes by checking Internet Identity authentication and the caller's backend user profile role, rendering loading, login-prompt, or unauthorized states as appropriate.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functions and status flags, backed by DFINITY's AuthClient and exposed via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including portal access applications, user profile retrieval, authentication, and Stripe configuration mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines a deep navy and gold academic color theme using CSS custom properties (oklch), Tailwind base/utilities, custom utility classes, and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AccessApplicati: Admin page that lists portal access applications with options to approve or reject them, displaying generated credentials in a modal upon approval.
Admin dashboard that shows navigation cards for all major admin modules and falls back to an admin setup flow if no profile is found for the authenticated user.
One-time admin account setup page that prompts an authenticated Internet Identity user to claim the admin role, or redirects to the dashboard if already configured.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdmissionsManag: Admin page for reviewing and processing admission applications, allowing admins to admit or reject applicants via a table UI with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/admin/FeeManagementPa: Admin page for managing fee types, providing a form to add new fee entries (name, amount, programme, session) and a table listing existing fee types.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HostelManagemen: Admin page for reviewing hostel accommodation applications, allowing admins to approve or reject individual applications displayed in a status-badged table.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagingPage.t: Admin page for composing and sending announcements to targeted user roles (students, staff, parents, etc.), with a local history of sent messages displayed below the form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProgrammeManage: Admin page for managing academic courses, providing a form to add new courses (code, name, department, programme, level, credit units) and a table of existing courses.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ResultsManageme: Admin page for posting and viewing student results, with a form to select student/course/semester/grade and a table displaying all existing results. Protected by RoleGuard for admin access.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StaffManagement: Admin page for staff management that displays a placeholder UI, noting that staff accounts are managed via Internet Identity rather than direct admin control.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StudentManageme: Admin page for registering new students via a form and displaying all existing students in a table, using the addStudentProfile and getAllStudents query hooks.
A page that allows users to check their admission status by JAMB number or name, displaying admitted/rejected/pending results with appropriate icons and messaging.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: A landing page for the 2024/2025 admissions process, showing important dates, a step-by-step application guide, and links to apply or check admission status.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFormPage.t: A multi-step application form page collecting personal info, JAMB details, O'Level results, programme choice, and document uploads, then submitting the application via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/auth/RoleLoginPage.ts: Role-specific login page that handles Internet Identity authentication and redirects users to the appropriate dashboard based on their role (student, staff, admin, or parent).
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page displaying university stats, portal entry cards (student, staff, admin, parent), and navigation that routes authenticated users to their role-specific dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/IdPasswordLoginPage.t: A login page where users select a role and enter their assigned ID and password to authenticate, then get redirected to the appropriate role-based dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/parent/ParentDashboar: Parent dashboard that allows parents to link a student account by ID and view that student's academic results grouped by semester with GPA calculations.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: A simple page shown when a payment is cancelled or fails, informing the user no charges were made and providing links back to the fee statement or dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a payment confirmation page that verifies a Stripe session status, records the payment, and shows success or error feedback with a reference number and dashboard navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/PortalAccessApplicati: Renders a form for new users to apply for portal access by submitting their name, email, role, and programme/department, then displays a confirmation with a reference ID on success.
frontend/src/pages/PortalSelectionPage.t: Shows a landing page with role-based portal cards (Student, Staff, Admin, Parent) that navigate users to the appropriate login route when clicked.
Staff dashboard displaying summary stats (students, courses, results) and navigation cards to key staff functions like posting results and viewing courses.
frontend/src/pages/student/CourseRegistr: Displays available courses grouped by semester for a student's department and level, allowing them to register or deregister individual courses with live feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/pages/student/FeeStatementP: Shows a student's fee statement including total paid, outstanding fees, and a payment history table, with a 'Pay Now' button that initiates a Stripe checkout session.
frontend/src/pages/student/HostelApplica: Allows a student to submit a hostel accommodation application by selecting room type and session, and displays the current application status (pending, approved, or rejected) if one exists.
frontend/src/pages/student/PaymentHistor: Renders a table of all the student's past payment transactions with a total-paid summary card, fetched via the payment history query hook.
frontend/src/pages/student/ReceiptPage.t: Displays a printable official payment receipt for a specific payment ID, showing student details, fee type, amount, and reference pulled from payment history and user profile.
frontend/src/pages/student/ResultsPage.t: Displays a student's academic results grouped by semester, calculating GPA per semester and color-coding grade badges.
frontend/src/pages/student/StudentDashbo: Main student dashboard showing profile info, enrolled courses count, results, unpaid fees alert, and navigation cards/sidebar links to all student portal sections.
frontend/src/pages/student/TranscriptPag: Renders a printable official academic transcript grouped by semester with course details, grades, per-semester GPA, and overall GPA.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Provides utility functions to format numeric or bigint amounts as Nigerian Naira strings using Intl.NumberFormat.
frontend/src/utils/principal.ts: Exports a helper to truncate and display an ICP Principal identifier in a shortened, readable format.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using OKLCH variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of a full university portal project (version 23) built on Internet Computer with React + Motoko, documenting architecture, existing features, known issues, and planned modules including role-based auth, admissions, dashboards, and a new portal access application system.
